summary: Comprehensive testing of CIA SERVICIOS new features: AI Integration (GPT-5.2), PDF Generation (Quotes/Invoices), and File Upload/Download. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows tested successfully.

backend_apis: AI Chat Basic Message (POST /api/ai/chat) - GPT-5.2 integration working
AI Chat requires authentication (401 without token)
AI Project Analysis 404 for non-existent project
Quote PDF Generation (GET /api/pdf/quote/{quote_id}) - Valid PDF returned
Invoice PDF Generation (GET /api/pdf/invoice/{invoice_id}) - Valid PDF returned
File Upload rejects invalid base64 (400 response)
frontend_flows: Intelligence page loads with AI status card
Quick prompts section visible (Análisis Financiero, Estado de Proyectos, etc.)
AI responses received correctly with company context
Quotes dropdown menu shows 'Descargar PDF' option
Invoices page loads with financial stats
Documents page loads with category filters
Document file input, name, project, category fields present
Document download option in dropdown menu

seed_data_creation: Test documents created with prefix 'TEST_' during backend testing. 8 documents now in document repository.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) AI Integration with GPT-5.2 works - provides contextual business analysis. 2) PDF generation for quotes/invoices using reportlab library - generates valid PDFs with company branding. 3) File upload/download using base64 encoding in MongoDB - supports max 5MB files. All APIs are real integrations (not mocked).

ai_integration.notes: AI responses include company context (projects, invoices, clients)

pdf_generation.notes: PDFs returned as base64, frontend decodes and downloads

file_upload_download.notes: 5MB max file size enforced, supports multiple categories
